runners.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 366m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a P5. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 366m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a P5. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (24.58) at this track at last run and returns here after a seven months break. Has started fresh up two times for a win and a placing. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when eighth (24.58) at this track at last run and returns here after a seven months break. Has started fresh up two times for a win and a placing. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Through the first turn was tightened and checked.

runners.formComment: Won again in an impressive display after running them ragged recording back-to-back wins at this track over 366m (19.91). Key chance and should go close again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a sixth (20.55) in a P5 at this track. Makes return after a 12 weeks break. Will need everything to go right.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time when sixth (19.46) at Q Straight in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 6 for the first time. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

runners.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (19.93) over 366m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and appears tested on latest effort.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Q Lakeside over 457m. Thereabouts at her last couple and is capable of better.

runners.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Velocity Yin at Q Straight last start over 300m (16.85). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 366m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Others better.
